title: 3g (6 Pack), Super Glue Gel, All Purpose, Fast Setting, No Run Formula with Anti Clog Cap, Ideal for Metal, Ceramics, Leather & More
features: Quick Drying Adhesive: Sets in 10-30 seconds, saving time on repairs without needing clamping.
Easy to Use: Airtight tubes prevent drying out, and the precision nozzle allows clean, mess-free application.
All-Purpose Glue: Works on plastic, ceramic, rubber, paper, leather, metal, and more, with 12 x 3g tubes for convenience and portability.
Reliable Bond: Provides resistance to everyday wear, weather, and light impact for indoor and outdoor use.
Dependable Performance: Suitable for small repairs and everyday projects around the house or workshop.
description: ALECPEA Instant Super Glue Gel- Strong All-Purpose Clear Glue for High-Quality Repairs Repair, fix and save with the practical and multi-purpose ALECPEA Super Glue Gel. Has the handle of your favourite mug broken off. Are you looking for a strong glue to mend precious china. Look no further than ALECPEA Super Glue Gel. This multi-purpose glue helps you to easily handle any kind of small daily repair job around the house. Providing instant strength, transparent drying technology and an anti-clog cap, ALECPEA ensures durable, long-lasting and invisible repairs. This practical, transparent glue works on a variety of materials – from wood, rubber, plastic and more – it even works as a leather glue. This instant glue Gel not only withstands heavy loads but is also shock-resistant and serves as a waterproof glue and a heatproof glue, proving reliable for a huge range of requirements and users. Before applying, simply ensure the surfaces you want to bond are clean, dry and close-fitting. Lightly dampen porous surfaces to ensure strong adhesion. Just remove the cap and apply a small quantity of the liquid glue to one surface, press both surfaces together immediately and hold them in place until the bond sets. Done. Instant strength in a single drop.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Dries Clear, Fast Drying, Heat Resistant, Non Toxic, Strong
